title: onosma emodi var. stelligera
intro: Onosma emodi var. stelligera, also known as the Gold Thread or Stellate Onosma, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, native to the Himalayan and mountainous regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including the reduction of pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects. Additionally, Onosma emodi var. stelligera has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
